title: Set up your development environment
excerpt: Get familiar with the Stripe CLI and our server-side SDKs. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Ruby](https://docs.stripe.com/get-started/development-environment.md?lang=ruby) - [Python](https://docs.stripe.com/get-started/development-environment.md?lang=python) - [Go](https://docs.stripe.com/get-started/development-environment.md?lang=go) - [Java](https://docs.stripe.com/get-started/development-environment.md?lang=java)
